title: PostCallAnalysis
description: Structured output of the post-call LLM analysis. Produced by src/post-call/analyzer.ts after every completed call.

intent.description: Primary intent detected during the call

summary.description: 2-3 sentence factual summary of the call

nextAction.description: Recommended next action for the sales/support team

keyFacts.description: Key facts extracted: name, company, need, budget, deadline
